title: Interfaces, Dynamic Types, Errors, and API Boundaries
description: A notification service must accept narrow capabilities, preserve error causes, and distinguish nil interfaces from typed nil values. Learners cumulatively produce a capability-oriented notification boundary through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define small consumer-owned interfaces and use implicit satisfaction without premature abstraction.
Trace interface dynamic type and value, nil interfaces, typed nil pointers, comparison, and method dispatch.
Use checked type assertions and type switches only where dynamic behavior is part of the boundary contract.
